contact.title: Contact Form
contact.summary: Contact form with CAPTCHA guard and Slack notification stub.

customer-account.title: Customer Account
customer-account.summary: Passwordless customer sign-in (magic-link + email-OTP) plus a /account dashboard, linked-accounts settings, and a server-side session helper.

members-only-purchase.title: Members-only Purchase
members-only-purchase.summary: Requires a signed-in customer session before checkout. Reads CHECKOUT_POLICY env ("open" | "members-only"); host wires the guard at the top of /api/checkout/start.
